src: A small teapot made of polished brown clay with a smooth body and short spout, a curved handle, and a delicate lid knob, on a textured dark ceramic saucer.
edit: A small teapot crafted from light maple and dark walnut wood. It has a rounded body, short spout, curved handle, and a lid with a polished knob. It sits on a carved wooden plate with concentric carvings.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: the object angled to the left on a wooden surface, surrounded by out-of-focus white flowers and a blurred colorful leaf on the side.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object sits on a rough wooden table in front of a textured off-white wall, next to a white cup on a dark saucer.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: The object is viewed from above, on a ribbed, round dish on a beige fabric runner on a dark wooden table, near a filled teacup with a metallic edge.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: the object is centered on a dark wooden table before an ornately carved panel, with a white cup to the left on a matching saucer, lit with warm ambient lighting.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The object is on a textured, square pedestal on a smooth, dark wooden table, next to a white teacup with a floral pattern on a saucer against a white background.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: the object is slightly tilted on a tatami mat, with cherry blossoms in the foreground and a blurred maple leaf on the side, reminiscent of Zen gardens.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object sits centrally on a polished wooden table, in front of an off-white wall like shoji screens, next to a plain white cup on a dark ceramic saucer.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The object is on a round ceramic dish with cherry blossom patterns on a beige linen runner on a mahogany table. Nearby is a teacup with a metallic edge, capturing a minimalist design from above.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: A serene object on a dark wooden table, with a wooden shoji screen behind. Soft lighting illuminates the scene. To the left, a white porcelain cup on a saucer, embodying Japanese style's purity and simplicity.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: An object rests on a lacquered, square pedestal with a wave pattern, atop a dark elm table. Nearby, a white teacup with cherry blossoms sits on a dark saucer. The backdrop is minimalist white, reflecting Japanese design aesthetics.
